---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or behavior change
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem statement

What are you trying to accomplish that Evidentia doesn't currently
support? What's the compliance, risk, or engineering workflow that this
would unlock?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you want to happen. If you have a specific
API or CLI shape in mind, sketch it here.

```bash
# example CLI usage
evidentia ...
```

or

```python
# example library usage
from evidentia_core import ...
```

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about? Why is this one preferable?

## Scope

Does this fit into a specific phase of the roadmap?

- [ ] Phase 1.x — gap analysis / crosswalk / catalog improvements
- [ ] Phase 2 — evidence collectors (AWS, GitHub, Okta, Azure, GCP)
- [ ] Phase 3 — AI evidence validation
- [ ] Phase 4 — platform (REST API, web UI, multi-tenant)
- [ ] Phase 5 — ecosystem (plugins, marketplace, Terraform)
- [ ] Not sure / doesn't fit an existing phase

## Additional context

Screenshots, references to OSCAL specs, links to other tools that do this,
prior art from the compliance community, etc.
